win_condition: When a player completes the required number of objectives (player-count dependent), finish the round; highest total objective points wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with the most completed objective cards wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Plot Objectives
categories.description: Points from completed plot-layout objective cards.

categories.description: Points from completed bamboo-growth objective cards.

categories.label: Gardener Objectives
categories.description: Points from completed gardener/panda positioning objective cards.
